{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Blackflame scales
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Noroloth]] is described as a pile of [[Blackflame scales]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
